description_long: This kiosk is a tall, rectangular structure with a slim profile, standing vertically on a pair of sturdy, flat feet for stability. The front face features a vibrant purple panel with a subtle hexagonal pattern and white text, likely serving as a promotional or informational display. The sides and rear of the kiosk are plain and unadorned, finished in a neutral light gray color. The kiosk appears to be constructed from lightweight composite materials, possibly with a fabric or plastic front panel stretched over a metal or plastic frame. There are no visible windows, doors, or interactive components, suggesting it is designed primarily for signage or branding purposes. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, suitable for use in commercial or public urban environments.
description: A tall, slim, modern kiosk with a purple patterned front display panel and plain gray sides and back, supported by two flat feet. Designed for signage or branding in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the purple patterned display panel with white text and the supporting feet.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the kiosk's slim profile and the depth of the supporting feet.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a plain light gray surface with no signage or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again highlights the slim profile and the structure of the feet.
attribute_signage_type: printed sign on front panel, integrated into structure, with white text '36in STRAIGHT' and hexagonal pattern
attribute_roof_design: flat, flush with the vertical sides, no overhangs or decorative elements
